nasb.text: Jonathan stripped himself of the robe that was on him and gave it to David, with his armor, including his sword and his bow and his belt.

esv.text: And Jonathan stripped himself of the robe that was on him and gave it to David, and his armor, and even his sword and his bow and his belt.

cnv.text: 約拿單把自己身上的外袍脫下來給大衛，又把自己的戰衣、刀、弓和腰帶都給了他。

ccb.text: 并把身上的外袍、战衣、刀、弓和腰带都送给大卫。
